# Sample Profiles

These `.ini` files are ready-to-load Rez2ANS Next profiles. Download a profile, then use **Load Profile** in the application and select the file. After loading, render a preview and adjust it for your image.

| Profile | Best starting point for |
| --- | --- |
| `bbs-logo.ini` | Bold board names, group logos, and title screens |
| `portrait-cartoon.ini` | Faces, mascots, and illustration-style art |
| `tall-scroller.ini` | Vertical announcements and tall ANSI layouts |

Profiles are starting points, not universal presets. The source image has the largest effect on the result. Save your own adjusted profile from the application when you find settings that work for your workflow.
